coverage.reason: Coordinates the repository, rendered-output, live-site, and specialist evidence.
Representative home, catalogue, detail, guide, and tool pages were reviewed.
Crawlability, indexability, canonicals, redirects, rendering, and internal links were tested.
Quality, trust, thin-page risk, readability, and citation readiness were reviewed.
Existing and proposed structured data were checked against page-visible facts.
Formats, dimensions, loading behavior, and layout-shift exposure were reviewed.
Sitemap syntax, uniqueness, protocol, canonical alignment, and noindex exclusions were tested.
AI crawler access, answerability, entity consistency, and passage-level citability were reviewed.
Repeatable Lighthouse lab runs were collected for representative templates.
Desktop and mobile above-the-fold layouts were inspected.
Findings are sequenced into immediate, validation, and measurement phases.
Thousands of generated base and modifier pages require explicit quality and indexation controls.
No comparison or alternatives page is present or proposed in this changeset.
The current static site exposes only English URLs; run before publishing locale-specific routes.
Exile Crafter is not a local business and has no location-intent acquisition model.
The site has no physical locations or map-pack ranking objective.
Target-scoped Search Console, GA4, URL Inspection, and CrUX access was not available.
No target-authorized first-party backlink source was available; free-source discovery was inconclusive.
Run SERP-overlap clustering after a target keyword set and regional market are approved.
Search-intent fit, navigation, catalogue controls, and conversion paths were reviewed.
No prior immutable SEO baseline existed; this changeset adds deterministic checks for future drift.
The game-item catalogue has no checkout, merchant feed, purchasable product, or marketplace scope.
The Firecrawl connector was unavailable; complete local rendered-output crawling and sampled live requests were used.
The DataForSEO connector was unavailable; no paid metrics were inferred.
A verified 1200 by 630 social preview image closes the required Open Graph image gap.
The audit uses the Find, Leverage, Optimize, Win sequence for evidence and prioritization.
A free-first SERP sample and repository-native market signals informed advisory opportunities.
Run the production-versus-preview guard when the PR has a preview URL and a Search Ops site UUID.
